extension.summary: Play Blu-ray MPLS playlists from .strm files and create them via thediscdb.com
extension.description: Plays Blu-ray/UHD MPLS playlists via plugin:// URLs in .strm files. Built-in STRM Creator with two modes: enter a thediscdb.com URL for a single disc, or enter an EAN/UPC barcode to auto-scan and process all discs in a folder. Creates .strm files organized by show and season, works with any Kodi source (NFS, SMB, WebDAV, local).
